review_title: A Convenient AI Editor for Everyday Use
description: Canva AI Photo Editor is a great tool for quick and simple edits, especially for social media content. While it may not replace advanced editing software, it’s perfect for beginners and professionals looking for efficiency.
author: Michelle K.
pros: Easy-to-use interface with intuitive AI tools. Great for quick photo enhancements and edits. Saves time with automatic background removal. Offers high-quality AI-generated effects.
cons: Some advanced features require a paid subscription. Limited customization options compared to professional photo editing software. AI-generated edits can sometimes be inconsistent.

review_title: It's good, but could be better
description: I like it, but I think it would be better if it had more features and more ways to adjust what you want the ai to do. It's good for basic edits tho.
author: Bruna M.
pros: I like that it's integrated in Canva and the accuracy to remove backgrounds. It does a great job with removing an object from a photo also.
cons: The lack of manual adjustments and more features. When using the ai to edit a photo you're limited to just a few features.

description: MY OVERALL EXPERIENCE HAS BEEN GREAT FOR THE MOST PART. I JUST DO NOT LIKE THAT THEY HAVE MADE ALL THE BETTER TEMPLETS BE THE UPGRADE PRICING ONLY.
author: YURI B.
pros: CANVA PHOTO EDITOR HAS BEEN A LIFE SAVER FOR ME. IT IS SO EASY TO USE AND I USE IT FOR EVERYTHING. GRAPHICS ARE GREAT.
cons: THE CONS ARE THAT THE PRICES SEEM TO CHANGE. AND THEN IT TRIES TO TELL YOU THAT YOU HAVE TO BE UPGRADED FOR CERTAIN TEMPLETS

review_title: Canva is Still Great While Their AI Editor Is A Flop....
description: My overall experience with Canva Ai Photo Editor was not that great, which is sad because I have paid for Canva Premium for over two years now. I love Canva and think that it is an amazing service, and I am so glad to see that they have finally incorporated more AI into their service. However, their specific AI photo editor was a flop I continue DALL-E and the other AI photo tools that are available to premium service members.
author: Melanie B.
pros: I love Canva as a product. I think its AI Photo Editor was a flop because unless it has an image for reference it has no clue what image you are trying to reference. After reading the directions which only gave you specific directions on how to get the same character repeatedly it still was difficult to the image that I was looking for.
cons: Many times I would start with the Canva AI Photo Editor and it would give me an image that had absolutely nothing to do with what I was referencing and so I would have to start over. I would have more luck inputting my choice of image and the narrowing it down farther and getting more specific within search boxes that pulled up as I clicked but never with using AI Photo editor.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

description: Canva helped me make quick yet nice designs for different purposes. I totally recommend it for designs creation. However, the photo editing features are simple and quite fair.
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: Canva is very easy to use with millions of pre-set templates that helps you begin with any design.
cons: The photo editing features are quite few and are not set for complex editing

review_title: The amazing canva ai photo editor
description: I used to get my work done with its free trial but I’m now a pro version user, my overall experience with canva is simply amazing
author: Aly A.
pros: Simple, effective, fast and reliable editor that I depend on for my social media photos editing and content creation
cons: It’s easy interface. It’s so helpful to me that makes editing more easier than any other apps, thanks canva ai photo editor

description: Overall I am a raving fan of all things canva and it has changed my professional life dramatically!
author: Casey W.
pros: Big fan of all things Canva. Ai magic features have been very impressive so far and very easy to navigate which I appreciate. There is an extensive library of templates and design elements. Whether making social media posts, presentations, documents, invitations etc... theres an abundance of options, styles and themes.
cons: There are moments that I don't fully understand what the ai wants for me or how best to explain to it what i am looking for, but overall very impressive.

review_title: User friendly and easy to navigate/create
description: My overall experience is positive and I would definitely recommend it to people. It's user friendly and easy to navigate and easy to create.
author: Erica M.
pros: I like that you can use your own images and also images that Canva has already on the website. It's very easy to design and user friendly.
cons: What I like least about Canva AI Photo Editor is that sometimes it's slow but other than that, I haven't had any issues using this website other than the slowness.

description: My experience with Canva AI is that it is easy to use with a simple interface and ease of dealing with all the tools. I have used it several times and have not encountered any problems, in addition to the presence of many tools that help me to do many projects.
author: Ahmed F.
pros: The advantages of the program are ease of use with a simple interface and easy access to all the designs, folders and images you want with ease of creating designs with ease and there are many tools that make it easy for you to create your design easily
cons: There are no negatives or problems I have faced so far.

author: Julian A.
pros: I have used the AI Photo Editor and this thing works like magic, I would definitely recommend using this.
cons: It is only included in a premium subscription.
author_duration: Used the software for: I used a free trial

review_title: Plataforma básica y fácil de usar
description: En general es una buena plataforma, sin embargo no es mi primera opción de edición. No suelo usarla muy a menudo pero si me sirve de ve en cuando para diseños básicos .
author: Angélica T.
pros: Realmente que tiene varias opciones prediseñadas y que ayudan a dar guía a mis deseños.
cons: En lo personal me pareció un poco básica, tengo otras opciones de edición que me gustan más.

description: Overall, fantastic! I love using Canva!
author: Shaina P.
pros: What's not to like? I use Canva everyday and it's the only system I use.
cons: At this time, I don't have anything in particular to list.

review_title: Un outil de création contenu parfait !
author: Melanie D.
pros: Un outil de création contenu parfait pour de la gestion par équipe et de la déclinaison dans le cadre de stratégie internationale
cons: Le blocage d'ajout de couleurs et de typographie lors de la création de l'espace marque pour les utilisateurs non admin

author: Yusuph M.
pros: Easy to use and also has a lot of different templates and other necessary features to choos from.
cons: Can be a bit expensive sometimes to access some of the features.

description: Very easy to get your results with low experince with the program.
author: Joao O.
pros: What I liked most was how easy it was for me to use the program without prior training and get favorable results for my day-to-day work, it helps a lot.
cons: I have nothing to point out. I believe that over time my learning curve will improve, but from the beginning I felt that I could make easy progress in using Canva.

description: Las imagenes en la produccion de alimentos en ocasiones quedan elementos de producción atravesados en la foto y la opcion de mejorarla, me ha permitido alimentar el portafolio y calidad de las evidencias de produccion. Lo que mas me gusta son las plantillas que me aceleran algunos diseños que debo elaborar.
author: Alexandra R.
pros: La practicidad, facilidad , la calidad de las imagenes y las porpuestas de plantillas alli encontradas minimizan tiempos, y el tiempo es valioso.
cons: en mi caso ha sido muy practico sin embargo hay funciones que me han quedado dificiles de implementar, pero obedece mas a mi falta de explorar mas la herramienta.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

author: ALEX L.
pros: New tech with a lot of features, quick access.
cons: maybe price, it's very competitive if you compare to others
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

author: Mwesigye W.
pros: Has templates for graphics that are so easy to customize to create good graphics
cons: Exporting projects is slow and depends on internet connection
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

author: Moritz M.
pros: Designing and photo editing is quite easy with canva
cons: Everything is great you can remove backgrounds

review_title: Canva AI Photo Editor: creativo, veloce e sorprendentemente smart
description: Nel mio uso quotidiano, Canva AI Photo Editor è diventato un piccolo alleato. Lo uso per post sui social, presentazioni, copertine… e ogni volta riesce a darmi quel tocco in più senza stress. È veloce, visivo, anche divertente da usare. Non è perfetto, certo, ma per chi vuole risultati buoni con poco sforzo è quasi insostituibile. Lo consiglio? Assolutamente sì, soprattutto se cerchi uno strumento semplice ma efficace per migliorare le tue immagini. E se già usi Canva per altri progetti, è un motivo in più per provarlo.
author: Luca D.
pros: Una delle cose che mi ha stupito è la facilità con cui si possono rimuovere oggetti dalle foto o riempire lo sfondo. Basta selezionare, cliccare su "Magic Edit", e in pochi secondi l’intelligenza artificiale fa il suo lavoro. Il risultato? Nella maggior parte dei casi, davvero pulito e naturale. Non serve sapere nulla di fotoritocco. L’interfaccia è chiara, le funzioni sono guidate e ti senti subito in controllo. Anche se non sei un designer, riesci a tirare fuori immagini belle e curate. La cosa che amo è che puoi partire da una foto, modificarla con l’AI, aggiungere testi, grafiche, layout… tutto nello stesso posto. È comodo e fa risparmiare un sacco di tempo. Mi sono divertito anche a usare le funzioni di generazione immagini e modifica del volto. È uno di quegli strumenti dove inizi per lavoro e finisci a giocare mezz’ora perché ti intrippa.
cons: Capita che l’oggetto rimosso lasci delle "scie" o che il riempimento sia un po’ strano. Nulla di tragico, ma ogni tanto bisogna riprovare più volte per ottenere un risultato pulito. Alcuni strumenti AI più avanzati non sono disponibili nella versione gratuita. Se non hai Canva Pro, le possibilità sono un po’ limitate. Per quanto sia ottimo per la maggior parte delle esigenze, se lavori nel mondo del design professionale, alcune cose restano fuori portata. Non è ancora un sostituto di software come Photoshop o Lightroom.
author_duration: Used the software for: I used a free trial

review_title: Canva- A Companion I never thought I needed
description: My experience was amazing. I was able to get my desired outcome with minimal effort, time and cost. I also learnt more and improved my skill.
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: It is very easy to use even for a person with no photography or editing background. I could very easily remove or change the background and also enhance the photos.
cons: Most of the very attractive and eye catching templates and features are under the premium package. It feels bad when you have already visualized using a certain template only to realize you need to pay more to use it.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: My journey with canva AI photo editor
description: My journey with canva AI photo editor is more or than 4 years old. It offers me a beautiful time and creates beautiful moment among my friends and nearby people.
author: Md amirul islam A.
pros: It is very useful tool for making a design for a beginners who is not associated to the design industry or have a kin knowledge about designs.
cons: It takes time and efforts to design through the mobile.

review_title: practical creation tool with variety of ready-made templates
description: Sometimes used for more complex work, where I need to give movement and dimension to the images.
author: Kenia S.
pros: I really like Canva AI for transforming objects into 3D images and also images for drawings with various types of models.
cons: limited version, difficulty loading and saving sometimes takes a long time, customer service takes a long time to get answers
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

description: I use it when designing my own pages, and because it's easy and supported by artificial intelligence, it implements my ideas with its own.
author: ALİ E.
pros: ease of visual development with artificial intelligence
cons: I guess there is nothing I don't like. It's too good for an app that provides free access

description: I use Canva daily, I really like it, it makes my work a lot easier.
author: Jaqueline F.
pros: I really like Canva, as it is an easy-to-use application. I also like the different free tools that canva offers.
cons: It could have more free functions, such as resizing images. I understand that the app needs a financial return, but I think it could offer more free resources to users.
